final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing illustration of a steampunk mechanical apparatus (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 蒸汽朋克 aesthetic with precision industrial vintage sensibility — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include complex gears, pipes, and gauges as the focal mechanical assembly
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a precise yet nostalgic industrial atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a brass and copper dominant direction — exact tonal ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a 黄铜 and 铜质 surface treatment with Victorian decorative ornamentation — exact grain, patina, and relief weight are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
